patent_context.patent_title: Portable air quality monitoring device with wireless alert system
patent_context.claim_description: A portable air quality monitoring device comprising a particulate matter sensor module, a gas detection unit, a wireless communication module configured to transmit alert data, and a threshold-based notification mechanism

product.product_description: A compact air quality sensor kit sold to building managers and HVAC contractors for indoor air monitoring. The kit includes a PM2.5 sensor, a VOC gas sensor, WiFi connectivity, and an app-based alert system.
product.staple_reasoning: The AirSafe Mini is specifically designed for the patented air quality monitoring and alert application and has no substantial non-infringing use beyond this purpose

supplier_conduct.reason_to_believe_details: The supplier was previously a contract manufacturer for the patent holder and has detailed knowledge of the patented system design.
supplier_conduct.instructions_details: Setup guide describes configuring the device in the same manner as the patented system, referencing alert thresholds from the patent specification.
supplier_conduct.inducement_details: Marketing materials describe the product as a 'compatible alternative' to the patented monitoring system.

claims.claim_text: A portable air quality monitoring device comprising a particulate matter sensor module, a gas detection unit, a wireless communication module configured to transmit alert data, and a threshold-based notification mechanism

structured_elements.text: wireless communication module configured to transmit alert data

claims.accused_product_description: The AirSafe Mini includes a PM2.5 sensor, a VOC gas sensor, WiFi connectivity for sending data to a cloud dashboard, and an app-based push notification system with configurable thresholds.

element_mapping_facts.e1: AirSafe Mini is a portable air quality monitoring device — matched
element_mapping_facts.e4: WiFi connectivity transmits data to cloud — may or may not constitute a 'wireless communication module' as a distinct component
element_mapping_facts.e5: App-based push notifications with configurable thresholds — matches threshold-based notification

claims.disputed_element_notes: The term 'wireless communication module' is disputed — is WiFi connectivity to a cloud dashboard the same as a dedicated 'module configured to transmit alert data'? The term 'module' may require a discrete hardware component. The term 'configured to' in element e4 is also ambiguous — does it require hardware configuration or software configuration?
claims.specification_notes: The patent specification describes a dedicated radio transceiver module for direct device-to-device alert transmission, not cloud-mediated notifications.

evidence.evidence_notes: Former contract manufacturer with detailed knowledge; marketing materials and setup guide available as evidence.
